retry_reason: Failure indicates allocation or registration error; retrying without changing conditions would likely fail again.

judge.reason: The function performs extensive initialization and registration of an SCSI host (ID allocation, field setup, scsi_add_host) rather than solely managing a reference count. The refcount operations are internal to helper calls and not the primary purpose.
